desc: Led the design and deployment of CI/CD pipelines automating the full ML lifecycle (data preprocessing, training, validation, deployment, analytics), reducing manual workload and accelerating release cycles.

Developed an AI agent for Jira ticket triage using Generative AI, Camunda, AWS Bedrock, Claude, and RAG, automating ticket classification and response which led to the reduction of manual workload by 75%.

Built AI-powered monitoring dashboards to track live model performance and reliability in production, and led diagnosis of underperforming models through statistical analysis, retraining, and hyperparameter tuning.
Modernized legacy services with FastAPI, MongoDB, and AWS Lambda, introducing unit testing, API redesign, and documentation standards across the codebase.
Responsible for maintaining the Image Recognition codebase, reviewing and approving code changes, and enforcing coding standards, engineering best practices, and software quality.
Developed, trained, and deployed AI computer vision models across 300+ different client projects.
Built and deployed containerized ML workflows using Docker and Kubernetes, improving model reliability and portability across cloud-native environments.
Contributed to CI/CD pipeline development supporting data preprocessing, model training, and deployment workflows.
Core contributor and founding member of the global AI team, collaborating with engineers and data scientists across the organization.
Developed clean, maintainable, and scalable C# solutions integrating DevExpress components across 100+ client-specific enterprise applications.
Led technical support and solution development for C#, ASP.NET Web Forms, ASP.NET MVC, and Blazor applications, delivering implementation guidance and resolving complex engineering issues.
Provided expert technical consultation to enterprise clients on implementing and optimizing DevExpress UI components within production applications.
Authored over 100 technical code examples and implementation guides published on the DevExpress website, demonstrating best practices and real-world use cases.
Diagnosed, debugged, and resolved software defects while enhancing legacy codebases to improve application performance, stability, and maintainability.

Created comprehensive technical documentation, implementation guides, and troubleshooting procedures, reducing recurring support inquiries by 75% and improving knowledge sharing across engineering teams.
Managed nationwide service operations across the Philippines, overseeing project execution, field service, and customer support for industrial automation systems.
Assembled, commissioned, diagnosed, and troubleshot industrial robots and automated machinery, ensuring reliable system performance and minimal downtime.
Reduced operational costs by 50% by leading cross-functional projects, optimizing workflows, and consistently delivering projects ahead of schedule and under budget.
Contributed to the mechanical and electrical design of five custom industrial automation machines, collaborating with multidisciplinary engineering teams from concept through deployment.
Developed standardized engineering procedures and built over 10 custom in-house tools, reducing production costs by 20% while improving operational efficiency and workflow productivity by 75%.

projects.title: Sign Language Translator

projects.title: Lifebuoy Carrying Quadcopter Drone
projects.desc: The following is one of our undergraduate project where we made a drone out of store-bought part. This drone was designed to carry and drop a lifebuoy near an active drowning victim where he/she can reach easily and where she can stay afloat while waiting for the rescuer to arrive.

projects.title: AI Language Translator
projects.desc: This project aims to train and use a multi-head attention transformer model to translate German text to English. Dataset that will be used in this implemenation is the Multi30k dataset. The model that will be used is the Multi-Head Self-Attention Transformer model I created from scratch.
